Week Two Worksheet
What are 3 content pillars for
your brand?
If you had to create content
“buckets” or types, what would
they be? Some examples
include: Sustainability,
transparency, Employee
appreciation, brand affirmation,
FAQ’s, Ingredient highlights...
What are the goals of your
brand? What do you want your
content to deliver?
Come up with at least 5, feel
free to keep going though!
This is your chance to brain dump! Fill out this worksheet
to get a solid base to creating content for your brand.
Brands come in all shapes and sizes. Influencer
brands, product brands, service brands, information
brands, gumbo shrimp, shrimp scampi… Sorry got off
track there but you get the point.
Tell me what kind of brand you are:
If you had to tell someone what your brand was about
in a nutshell, what would you say? Keep this short, to
the point, and memorable.
Examples:
• Smart Marketer: Serve the world unselfishly and
profit
• BOOM!: It’s about women, it’s about Beauty, its
about time
• Taco Bell: Live Mas
• Nike: Just do it
Your awesome brand mission:
WHAT KIND OF BRAND ARE YOU?
WHAT IS YOUR MISSION?
